results.title: “Skin Barrier Care Starts at the Sink” — Dr.BRID C Offers Its Signature K-beauty Cleanser at $9.99 for a 4-Day Prime Day Campaign
results.description: Revived by a single college student’s letter, the Soothing Jelly Cleanser invites shoppers to experience the brand’s belief that barrier protection begins with cleansing. NEW YORK and SEOUL, South Korea, June 23, 2026 /PRNewswire/ — Dr.BRID C, a next-generation, biotech-based K-beauty skin barrier brand from Korea, announced it will offer its signature Soothing Jelly Cleanser [...] The post “Skin Barrier Care Starts at the Sink” — Dr.BRID C Offers Its Signature K-beauty Cleanser at $9.99 for a 4-Day Prime Day Campaign appeared first on Australian Business Announcements .
